news.t: Schwab Asset Management to Launch the Schwab Core Bond ETF
Schwab to launch new active bond fund amid banner ETF Year
The Schwab Ultra-Short Income ETF (SCUS) Begins Trading

overview.description: The Schwab Ultra-Short Income ETF (SCUS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, investing in US dollar-denominated, investment grade, short-term debt securities from both domestic and foreign issuers. The fund aims for current income and capital preservation, maintaining a portfolio duration of one year or less SCUS was launched on Aug 13, 2024 and is issued by Charles Schwab.

data.title: Schwab Asset Management to Launch the Schwab Core Bond ETF
data.text: WESTLAKE, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Schwab Asset Management®, the asset management arm of The Charles Schwab Corporation, today announced the launch of the Schwab Core Bond ETF (NYSE Arca: SCCR). It's t...

data.title: Schwab to launch new active bond fund amid banner ETF Year
data.text: Charles Schwab is the latest asset management firm to beef up active ETFs as investors look for options to balance passive and hands on investment strategies.

data.title: The Schwab Ultra-Short Income ETF (SCUS) Begins Trading
